evidence_summary: Establish the scale and lethality of the Martian warrior force through a high-tension encounter. The sequence must contrast the protagonist's small, hidden presence against the rhythmic, heavy movement of twenty mounted warriors passing in close proximity.

The protagonist hears the rattle of equipment and realizes a party of twenty mounted Martian warriors is approaching. He narrowly avoids being killed by the leader's spear as they pass near his hiding spot.
Protagonist hears rhythmic equipment rattling in the distance.
Protagonist remains frozen in terror as the cavalry passes.
A mounted party of twenty warriors thunders past a hiding protagonist, nearly impaling him with a leader's spear.
